prompt: Vertical 9:16 editorial lifestyle photograph. An overstuffed women's wardrobe: wooden hangers packed tightly along a clothes rail, garments crammed together in muted creams, soft greys and dusty pinks. A woman's hand (no face) reaches in and pushes hangers aside, searching. Warm domestic daylight from a side window, soft natural shadows. Slightly desaturated with a gentle warm blush colour cast conveying quiet frustration. Realistic, shallow depth of field, fine fabric texture. No text, no logos, no readable labels.
